occurrence_sentence: Indiana University's New Center Will Develop Technologies, Materials for Quantum Revolution

interaction_phrase: works with laser equipment in his Simon Hall lab at IU Bloomington
occurrence_sentence: Indiana University professor Phil Richerme works with laser equipment in his Simon Hall lab at IU Bloomington.
Indiana University professor Phil Richerme works with laser equipment in his Simon Hall lab at IU Bloomington.

interaction_phrase: IU Bloomington Emerging Areas of Research program
occurrence_sentence: Support for the center comes from the IU Bloomington Emerging Areas of Research program, which contributed $3 million toward the center's creation.

interaction_phrase: the important contributions IU is making
occurrence_sentence: The new center reflects the important contributions IU is making to this second quantum revolution.
The new center reflects the important contributions IU is making to this second quantum revolution.

interaction_phrase: the economic and national security of the United States
occurrence_sentence: The U.S. government has endorsed the vast potential of quantum science research with passage of the [National Quantum Initiative Act ](https://www.aip.org/fyi/federal-science-bill-tracker/115th/national-quantum-initiative-act)to "accelerate quantum research and development for the economic and national security of the United States."

interaction_phrase: overseen by the Office of the Vice Provost for Research at IU Bloomington
occurrence_sentence: The Emerging Areas of Research program and the new center are overseen by the Office of the Vice Provost for Research at IU Bloomington.

interaction_phrase: An ion trap is pictured in the Richerme Lab in Simon Hall at IU Bloomington
occurrence_sentence: An ion trap is pictured in the Richerme Lab in Simon Hall at IU Bloomington.

interaction_phrase: Researchers affiliated with IU's new Quantum Science and Engineering Center, including Assistant Professor of Physics Phil Richerme, have succeeded in trapping ions in a two-dimensional plane
occurrence_sentence: Researchers affiliated with IU's new Quantum Science and Engineering Center, including Assistant Professor of Physics Phil Richerme, have succeeded in trapping ions in a two-dimensional plane.

interaction_phrase: IU's quantum expertise was recently on display at Indiana National Lab Day
occurrence_sentence: IU's quantum expertise was recently on display at Indiana National Lab Day, held in Indianapolis in October.

interaction_phrase: The Quantum Science and Engineering Center will also spur educational opportunities for IU students
occurrence_sentence: The Quantum Science and Engineering Center will also spur educational opportunities for IU students, including new undergraduate courses and potentially one of the country's first programs in quantum engineering.

interaction_phrase: IU Bloomington's interim vice provost for research
occurrence_sentence: "Quantum science and engineering is the future of communications, computation and cryptography," said Jeff Zaleski, IU Bloomington's interim vice provost for research.

interaction_phrase: IU Bloomington's interim vice provost for research
occurrence_sentence: "Quantum science and engineering is the future of communications, computation and cryptography," said Jeff Zaleski, IU Bloomington's interim vice provost for research. "Indiana University's intellectual expertise in quantum science truly puts the university at the forefront of this developing field, and we are eager to drive the leading edge of research in this area."
